title: Capstone: Build the Production Dashboard
concept: Assembling a basic dashboard that parses trace logs, displays loop metrics, and triggers alerts on loop stalls; 'Next up: Agentic AI Capstone.'.

exercises.prompt: What is a key component of a Service Level Agreement (SLA) for agents?
exercises.explain: A key component of an SLA for agents is the max run time, which ensures that agents complete tasks efficiently without excessive delays.

cards.title: Building a Dashboard
cards.body: A production dashboard helps you monitor your AI agents' performance in real-time.

cards.title: What is a Production Dashboard?
cards.body: A production dashboard is a visual display of key metrics related to AI agents' operations, showing their current performance and status.

cards.title: Dashboard as a Control Panel
cards.body: Think of a dashboard like a car's control panel, where you can see your speed, fuel level, and alerts, all helping you drive safely and efficiently.

cards.title: Example Dashboard Metrics
cards.body: A good dashboard might display metrics like loop completion time, error rates, or alerts for stalls in agent tasks.

cards.title: Myth: Dashboards are Just for Design
cards.body: Some think dashboards are only about looks; in reality, they provide critical insights to improve performance and detect issues.

cards.title: Dashboard Visualization
cards.body: Visualize your agent's activity with clear indicators.

exercises.prompt: What is the purpose of a production dashboard?
exercises.explain: The purpose of a production dashboard is to monitor AI agents' performance, ensuring they operate effectively and allowing for timely interventions.

exercises.prompt: True or False: A production dashboard should only show the best performances of AI agents.
exercises.explain: False. A production dashboard should display all performance metrics, including those that need improvement, to effectively monitor and optimize agent behavior.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the blank: A production dashboard helps in triggering alerts on ______ stalls.
exercises.sentence: A production dashboard helps in triggering alerts on loop stalls.
exercises.explain: The dashboard is crucial for detecting loop stalls, ensuring that agents operate smoothly.

exercises.prompt: Which statement best describes the importance of a dashboard in production?

options.text: It shows how many agents are online.
It displays metrics to help optimize agent performance.
It lists software updates for agents.

exercises.explain: The best description is that a dashboard displays metrics to help optimize agent performance, as it provides key insights needed for operation.

exercises.prompt: What are essential features to include in your production dashboard design?

options.text: Trace logs and alerting for stalls

exercises.explain: Essential features include trace logs and alerting for stalls, as they help monitor and quickly respond to issues in agent performance. Next up: Agentic AI Capstone.
